description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, gray gable roof and a striking black-and-white exterior. The property is surrounded by a white picket fence and features a spacious, well-maintained yard with several mature trees, a swimming pool, a gazebo, and a small shed. Large rectangular windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior, while the rear of the house has a balcony overlooking the backyard. The front entryway is understated, with a simple door and a small overhang, complemented by a driveway and a carport. Outdoor amenities include a patio area with seating, a swing set, and landscaped garden beds, making the space inviting for family activities and gatherings.
description: A modern two-story house with a black-and-white exterior, large windows, and a spacious fenced yard featuring a pool, gazebo, and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, main entryway, driveway, carport, and landscaped front yard with a white picket fence.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the white exterior, backyard with a swing set, hot tub, and balcony overlooking the yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white facade, large backyard with a pool, gazebo, and patio seating area, as well as multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the black facade, large windows, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and garden on the left side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, no porch, and direct access from the driveway
